adv-spoof-pdf.reason: Plain text bytes are not accepted as canonical PDF input.

adv-html-pdf.reason: HTML content named as PDF is rejected before parser dispatch.

adv-corrupt-pdf.reason: Corrupt PDF cannot pass PDF parser preflight.

adv-prompt-html.reason: Prompt injection content is preserved for review and not indexed.

adv-formula-csv.reason: Formula-leading CSV cells require quarantine or escaping policy before use.

adv-malformed-docx.reason: Malformed OOXML is rejected before trusted conversion output exists.

adv-traversal-docx.reason: Archive members with absolute paths or parent traversal are rejected.

adv-zip-bomb.reason: Archive bomb violates pre-parser archive limits.

adv-page-bomb.reason: PDF page count exceeds policy and is denied before expensive conversion.

adv-long-audio.reason: Excessive audio duration is preserved for review and not indexed.
